/**
 * LoginForm.jsx — Formulario de inicio de sesión (modo local)
 * ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 * Modo frontend puro: simula autenticación con setTimeout.
 * No requiere backend activo.
 *
 * Props:
 *   onSuccess(mode, username) — callback al login exitoso
 */import{useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function LoginForm(_ref){let{onSuccess}=_ref;const[email,setEmail]=useState("");const[pass,setPass]=useState("");const[showPass,setShowPass]=useState(false);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState("");const handleSubmit=()=>{setError("");if(!email||!pass){setError("▸ Completa todos los campos");return;}if(!email.includes("@")){setError("▸ Email inválido");return;}setLoading(true);// Simula llamada al backend — reemplazar con authApi.login() al conectar
setTimeout(()=>{setLoading(false);const displayName=email.split("@")[0];onSuccess("login",displayName);},1200);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"field",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"field-label",children:"\u25B8 CORREO ELECTR\xD3NICO"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"field-wrap",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"field-icon",children:"\uD83D\uDCE7"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"field-input",type:"email",placeholder:"heroe@quest.com",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value),onKeyDown:e=>e.key==="Enter"&&handleSubmit()})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"field",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{className:"field-label",children:"\u25B8 CONTRASE\xD1A"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"field-wrap",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"field-icon",children:"\uD83D\uDD12"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"field-input",type:showPass?"text":"password",placeholder:"\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022\u2022",value:pass,onChange:e=>setPass(e.target.value),onKeyDown:e=>e.key==="Enter"&&handleSubmit()}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"eye-btn",onClick:()=>setShowPass(p=>!p),children:showPass?"🙈":"👁️"})]})]}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"error-msg",children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"submit-btn",onClick:handleSubmit,disabled:loading,children:loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:["ENTRANDO",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"btn-loading",children:"..."})]}):"▶ INICIAR AVENTURA"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"divider",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"divider-line"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"divider-text",children:"O"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"divider-line"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"guest-btn",onClick:()=>onSuccess("login","Invitado"),children:"\uD83D\uDC64 CONTINUAR COMO INVITADO"})]});}
